name: Partnerships & Fundraising
tagline: Building alliances that expand our reach and multiply our impact across Atlanta.
overview: Partnerships & Fundraising is the blood that flows throughout the Emerging 100 Atlanta body. This committee cultivates and manages the corporate relationships, sponsorships, and grants that fund every program E100 runs. Partnerships closes the deal — from prospecting to signed agreement. White glove service. Grit. Storytelling. The kids and the work are the story — Partnerships makes sure the right people hear it.
